Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 58 

OTHC_EVENTS 

LABEL: Other Part B Carrier Events 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of events in the Part B other setting for a given year, which includes Part B 
carrier and DME claims which appear in settings other than the 10 specific categories which are part of 
this file for a given year. Claim lines for other carrier/DME claims are a subset of the claims in the
